positions.title: Software Development Engineer, GenAI & Automation
positions.description: Building automation and GenAI-assisted engineering workflows for release validation, debugging, deployment checks, and internal developer productivity.
achievements: Turned recurring engineering checks into reusable Python services that package logs, configuration details, and run context into traceable workflows.
Designed agent-style validation flows with planner-executor patterns, tool adapters, guardrails, retries, and execution logs engineers can audit.
Created FastAPI endpoints and internal portal integrations so teams can trigger regression runs, follow status, and review release certification output.
Connected CI/CD workflows with Jenkins to reduce manual handoffs around build validation and reporting.

positions.title: Software Engineer, AI Platform
positions.description: Worked on an LLM-powered cloud operations assistant focused on incident triage, RCA support, and guided troubleshooting across multi-cloud environments.
achievements: Built intent-routing and tool-selection logic that helped map operational questions to the right retrieval, diagnostic, or cloud workflow.
Implemented RAG components using embeddings, vector retrieval, and curated knowledge-base context for incident investigation.
Packaged AI workflow services with Docker and supported Kubernetes deployment cycles for platform integration.

positions.title: Machine Learning Engineer Co-op
positions.description: Created analytics and forecasting workflows that made workforce planning data easier to model, refresh, and explain.
achievements: Prepared ML-ready HR datasets by standardizing records, resolving data quality issues, and shaping features for workforce planning models.
Built attrition-risk, leave-usage, and turnover forecasting workflows using XGBoost, ARIMA, Prophet, and LSTM approaches.
Used NLP and GenAI-assisted text analysis to extract themes from employee feedback and support retention insights.
Delivered Power BI and QuickSight dashboards that made reporting faster and easier for stakeholders to revisit.

positions.title: Software Engineer, Full Stack
positions.description: Built backend services and data workflows for vehicle feature configuration, rule validation, and self-service packaging processes.
achievements: Designed Python REST APIs with schema validation, exception handling, and centralized business-rule logic.
Implemented a rule-validation engine for feature dependencies and configuration constraints.
Created batch jobs for ingestion, reconciliation, and scheduled reporting around configuration data.
Improved backend performance through SQL tuning, caching, and Docker-based service packaging.
